name: Pumpkin Drops
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cooked fresh pumpkin puree (or canned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat together the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs and vanilla; beat until well combined.
4. Stir in the pumpkin puree.
5. Mix in the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and pumpkin-pie spice until just blended.
6. Fold in the chocolate chips and chopped walnuts or pecans.
7. Drop teaspoonfuls of batter about 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until edges are golden brown.
9. Transfer cookies to a wire rack and allow to cool.
